business_ideas.idea: Agent.dev: Professional network for AI agents (recruiting, discovery, ratings)
Results as a Service (RaaS): Sell outcomes instead of software (e.g., customer acquisition)
MFM Vault: AI agents extracting frameworks, stories, ideas from podcast episodes

predictions.text: AI agents are the new apps; hybrid human-AI teams will replace purely human organizations in 10 years
Never been easier to make first million than right now due to AI agents enabling leverage
Short-sleeper syndrome drug (like Ozempic for sleep) will be worth trillions and add 10 life-years
